profile: Otherworld Control/Survival caster (Nine-Tails Kitsune). M.DMG hero built around stacking [Charm] on the enemy team, landing control reliably (Effect Hit Rate), an AoE Ultimate, and self/team sustain (lifesteal-style heals + ally revive). She scales mainly off Final DMG (per Charmed enemy) and Effect Hit Rate, applies debuffs, and is durable rather than a crit/basic-attack burst DPS. Wants Effect Hit, control/debuff amplifiers, Final DMG, true-dmg-on-debuffed-target, and Effect Resist survivability; she does NOT crit or basic-attack as a win condition.

ranking.name: Enchantress
ranking.reason: Her own themed mirror and a perfect fit: +Effect Hit Rate to land [Charm], applies [Fox Fire] (Effect Resist down + True DMG that scales when allies attack the target) - mirrors her debuff/control-survival identity exactly. Strong at every star, scales to 90% Fox Fire chance at 5*.

ranking.name: Baleful Omen
ranking.reason: Control-type: +Final DMG (her main scaling lever) plus [Lethal] on damage that blocks Soul Crystal revives - elite for a Control hero, and Final DMG feeds her per-Charm Awaken bonus. Up to 100% Lethal at 5*.

ranking.name: Bathory
ranking.reason: Pure Effect Hit Rate (+15% at 5*) - directly raises her [Charm] landing rate, the linchpin of her entire kit. Control-type, clean and reliable.

ranking.name: Firmament
ranking.reason: Flat +12%/+30% Final DMG, no condition - her primary damage scaler and stacks with her per-Charm Final DMG. Best generic offensive mirror for her.

ranking.name: Arthur
ranking.reason: Control-type: +ATK DMG vs enemies under Control (up to 25% at 5*). [Charm] is a control effect she applies to the whole enemy team, so near-permanent uptime.

ranking.name: Nuwa Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Effect Resist + control-effect blocking; bonus is gated on Damage-Share state so not always live, but base Final DMG and survivability suit a control-survival caster.

ranking.name: Alluring Gaze
ranking.reason: Big Effect Resist Rate (up to +45% at turn start, 5*) - keeps her from being controlled/dispelled so her Charm engine keeps running. Strong backline survivability.

ranking.name: Ling
ranking.reason: Skills deal +40→120% ATK True DMG, but ONLY to [Infect] targets. Enchantress applies [Charm], not [Infect], so applying 'lots of debuffs' does not satisfy the gate — it only comes online if a teammate supplies Infect. Team-dependent, capped at B.

ranking.name: Lucifer
ranking.reason: True DMG vs targets with DoT; at 3*+ also applies [Torment] (Healing-down + DoT amplify), matching her anti-heal theme. Conditional on DoT presence, which her debuff comp supplies.

ranking.name: Raphael
ranking.reason: Flat Effect Resist Rate (+15%) - keeps her uncontrolled so she keeps casting Ultimate and stacking Charm. Cheap, reliable survivability.

ranking.name: Ananke Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Base +Final DMG is useful, but the big bonus only fires vs Damage-Share/Transfer targets - situational, so solid-filler.

ranking.name: Elegy
ranking.reason: Healing-Received reduction matches her anti-heal theme, but gated on landing Crit, which she doesn't build - low trigger rate makes it filler.

ranking.name: Ying Gou
ranking.reason: Doubles [Infect] application - she applies no Infect herself, but as a debuff-stacker in an Infect comp it has marginal team value. Off-kit filler.

ranking.name: Nyx Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Bonus True DMG on passively-triggered AoE attacks - she has a strong AoE Ultimate but this keys on passive AoE; partial fit, decent filler.

ranking.name: Luna
ranking.reason: +Area Attack DMG (up to 25%) helps her AoE Ultimate, but does nothing on her single-target steal/heal turns - modest AoE-only boost.

ranking.name: Horde-Assault
ranking.reason: AoE skills get big bonus True DMG split across targets - feeds her Ultimate, but she's control/sustain not an AoE nuker, so damage-only filler.

ranking.name: Royal Awe
ranking.reason: Generic anima offensive stat-stick with no anti-synergy; serviceable bench filler when better synergy slots are full.

ranking.name: Wukong
ranking.reason: All attacks add flat True DMG (% of ATK) - universal chip damage with no condition, but her ATK is low and it ignores her control identity. Filler.

ranking.name: Throat-Slitting
ranking.reason: Final DMG bonus that decays per attack and resets on kill - she scales off Final DMG but isn't an on-kill attacker, so uptime is mediocre; bench Final DMG.

ranking.name: Lilith
ranking.reason: Control-type True DMG scaling per Debuff on the target (she stacks debuffs), but gated on Single Skill Attack while her Feat hits two targets - partial trigger; better at 3*+.

ranking.name: Isabella
ranking.reason: Final DMG + shield is mildly useful, but a DPS mirror tuned for a personal-burst carry; she gains little beyond the base Final DMG.

ranking.name: Sherry
ranking.reason: Doubles [Bleed] application - she applies no Bleed, so only marginal value in a dedicated Bleed comp. Off-kit.

ranking.name: Sariel
ranking.reason: Applies [Infect] when attacked - she's backline and rarely tanks hits, and applies no Infect herself; low-trigger off-kit control mirror.

ranking.name: Jeanne
ranking.reason: Final DMG RED + heal-boost survivability is fine for a backliner, but its big clause needs Damage-Share state; mostly defensive filler.

ranking.name: Elbera‘s Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: Effect Resist + on-buff-loss heal; the Effect Resist helps, but the heal trigger (buffs expiring) is unreliable for her. Minor survivability.

ranking.name: Titan Strength
ranking.reason: Heal/shield survivability with a second clause at 3*+, but a generic tank-support effect that does nothing for her Charm/control output.

ranking.name: Mystic Bull
ranking.reason: Shield support - adds backline durability but no offense or control synergy; only for pure survivability.

ranking.name: Frostglow
ranking.reason: DMG-reduction survivability; keeps her alive but off her control/damage identity. Defensive filler.

ranking.name: Rock Elephant
ranking.reason: DMG-reduction survivability, same as Frostglow - durability only, no synergy.

ranking.name: Eternal Stand
ranking.reason: DMG-reduction survivability; generic tankiness but contributes nothing to Charm/control or damage.

ranking.name: Garvin
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED (+15% at 5*) - clean survivability stat for a fragile backliner, but no synergy with her control/damage kit.

ranking.name: Zhiming
ranking.reason: Flat Final DMG RED (+5% max) - small survivability stat, no kit synergy. Low-end defensive filler.

ranking.name: Gaia Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: HP + lethal-hit AoE True DMG retaliation; a frontline-tank mirror. She's a mid-backline caster who shouldn't take lethal hits, so it rarely triggers.

ranking.name: Dark Tide
ranking.reason: Flat HP% - raw survivability with no synergy; minor durability filler for a fragile backliner.

ranking.name: Albert
ranking.reason: Flat HP% (+15% at 5*) - pure stat-stick durability, no kit interaction.

ranking.name: Venus
ranking.reason: DMG-reduction support mirror - generic survivability that keeps a fragile backliner alive, but no Charm/control or damage synergy.

ranking.name: Frankenstein
ranking.reason: Small flat HP% (+5% max) - tiny survivability, low quality, no synergy.

ranking.name: Dracula
ranking.reason: Heal + HP self-sustain - she already self-heals via her kit, and this off-role def mirror adds no control or damage.

ranking.name: Alucard
ranking.reason: Crit-based DPS mirror with a 3* breakpoint - she doesn't build Crit, so both the conditional clause and base miss. Dead for a non-crit caster.

ranking.name: Mars Soul Mirror
ranking.reason: True DMG on Feat-Skill CRIT hits - her Feat doesn't crit-build, so the trigger almost never fires. Anti-synergy via crit dependency.

ranking.name: Night Depths
ranking.reason: True-DMG ramp that stacks as SHE loses HP - but she self-heals and stays topped up, so the stacks barely build. Anti-synergy with her sustain.

ranking.name: Uncle Ying
ranking.reason: +Ultimate DMG - she has an AoE Ultimate but is a control/utility caster not an Ultimate-burst DPS, so the gain is small and off-role.

ranking.name: Van Helsing
ranking.reason: Ultimate-DMG boost that ramps with BASIC ATTACKS (3* breakpoint) - she barely basic-attacks, so the ramp never builds. Wasted.

ranking.name: Ada
ranking.reason: +ATK DMG vs debuffed enemies - the debuff condition fits, but it's a basic-ATK DPS mirror and she's not an auto-attacker, so most of her skill damage isn't boosted.

ranking.name: Michael
ranking.reason: Final DMG DPS mirror - the stat is fine but a lower-value generic than Firmament; redundant for her.

ranking.name: Aurora
ranking.reason: DEF Ignore - a physical/normal-DMG scaling lever; she deals M.DMG and debuff True DMG, so DEF Ignore does little.

ranking.name: Mister
ranking.reason: Flat ATK% (+5% max) - small stat; her ATK isn't her main lever (Final DMG/Effect Hit are). Low-value filler.

ranking.name: Kira
ranking.reason: Single-target ATK DMG - she's primarily an AoE/control caster; single-target boost misses most of her output.

ranking.name: Valendine
ranking.reason: Single-target execute-style DMG - off her AoE/control profile and keyed on single attacks she rarely leans on.

ranking.name: Galos
ranking.reason: Flat DEF% (+5% max) - tiny stat-stick, no synergy; her base DEF is negligible.

ranking.name: Vivi
ranking.reason: Crit Rate - she does not build or rely on Crit anywhere; dead. Classic crit-on-non-crit anti-synergy.

ranking.name: Aelia
ranking.reason: Crit DMG - useless without crits, which she never builds. Dead stat.

ranking.name: Adele
ranking.reason: Crit + basic-attack DPS mirror - she neither crits nor basic-attacks as a win condition; double anti-synergy.

ranking.name: Renais
ranking.reason: Basic-attack ramp + on-kill basic attack (3* breakpoint) - she's a skill/Ultimate caster who doesn't basic-attack, so both clauses are dead. Canonical anti-synergy.

ranking.name: Rose
ranking.reason: Final DMG tied to basic-attack/Ultimate cadence with a 3* basic-attack clause - the basic-attack dependency wastes most of it on her.

ranking.name: Scale-Splitting
ranking.reason: Crit + basic-attack + true-dmg anima mirror (3* breakpoint) - everything keys on crit/basic attacks she doesn't do. Anti-synergy across all clauses.

ranking.name: Wasteward
ranking.reason: Final DMG + basic-attack mirror - the Final DMG sliver is fine but built for an auto-attacker; she isn't one, so near-dead.

ranking.name: Daisy
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Crit DPS mirror - the crit half is dead on her and the rest is a worse generic; net trash for a non-crit caster.

ranking.name: Hinata Inori
ranking.reason: Final DMG + Crit, same as Daisy - crit dependency makes it dead weight.

ranking.name: Lincoln
ranking.reason: Crit DMG RED / crit-resist - a niche anti-crit defensive stat with no offensive or control value for her. Dead.

ranking.name: Yin
ranking.reason: Low-tier flat Final DMG (epic, +5% max) - strictly worse than Firmament/Michael and brings nothing unique; not worth a slot.

ranking.name: Azmodan
ranking.reason: Bleed-based def mirror - she applies no Bleed, so the effect never engages. Off-kit and dead.

ranking.name: Tinplate
ranking.reason: Reflect True DMG based on DEF after being hit - low-DEF backliner who avoids hits, so it scales off nothing and rarely triggers.

ranking.name: Flame Dawn
ranking.reason: Pure heal def mirror - she already self-heals and revives; a flat heal stat adds little and zero control/damage. Off-role.

ranking.name: Warding Blessing
ranking.reason: Shield support mirror with a 3* clause - generic team-shield utility with no synergy to her Charm/control engine; bottom-of-bench.

ranking.name: Theresa
ranking.reason: +Healing done support stat - she's not a dedicated heal-power healer; minimal benefit and off-role.

ranking.name: Heidi
ranking.reason: Single-target heal boost - her heals are kit-driven splash heals, not a scaling single-heal skill, so this barely applies.

ranking.name: Orpheus
ranking.reason: Turn-start self-heal support - redundant with her built-in sustain and contributes nothing to control or damage. Dead slot.

ranking.name: Jacob
ranking.reason: Final DMG + DMG-RED that ramps as she loses HP - she self-heals and stays high, so the ramp never builds; anti-synergy with her sustain.
